relations.note: The signature button resides inside the gradient callout layout.

quotes: Background → the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized cover, no-repeat, centered, spanning the full content width (600px). Always set a solid background-color of Sunshine #faa31b as fallback
Headline → Brand Blue #00529b, centered, sitting in the top third, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line.

Background → the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized cover, no-repeat, centered, spanning the full content width (600px). Always set a solid background-color of Sunshine #faa31b as fallback
Headline → Brand Blue #00529b, centered, sitting in the top third, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line.

rules.intent: Maintain brand styling and client fallback rendering for the gradient CTA section.
rules.rule_text: The Gradient Callout CTA section utilizes the branded orange/yellow gradient image (image_treatment.background.callout_gradient = https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png) as cover, with a solid Sunshine background fallback (color.primary.sunshine = #faa31b) and a centered Brand Blue headline (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b).
rules.snippets:
<mj-section
    background-url="https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png"
    background-size="cover"
    background-repeat="no-repeat"
    background-position="center center"
    background-color="#faa31b"
    padding="48px 25px 56px 25px">

quotes: Fill Deep Blue #003D74, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold #FFC20E arrow
Fill Deep Blue #003D74, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold #FFC20E arrow › (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px.
Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.

rules.intent: Maintain structural brand integrity and signature aesthetic shape rules for key conversion buttons.
rules.rule_text: The signature CTA button uses a Deep Blue fill (color.secondary.deep_blue = #003D74) with a white label, a Gold arrow (color.cta.gold_accent = #FFC20E), and must strictly maintain the asymmetric border radius (radius.cta.signature_button = 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px). Do not simplify or swap corners.
